turns.svg:
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id='bgGrad' cx='50%' cy='30%' r='70%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#f7fbf7'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#e9f2ee'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id='billGrad' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#49b36a'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#2f8a4a'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='billEdge' x1='0' x2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='rgba(0,0,0,0.12)'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='rgba(255,255,255,0.06)'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='coinGrad' x1='0' x2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#ffd86b'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#f5b400'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id='softShadow' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'>
      <feDropShadow dx='0' dy='6' stdDeviation='8' flood-color='#000' flood-opacity='0.18'/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(#bgGrad)' />

  <!-- Back bill -->
  <g transform='translate(66,160) rotate(-8)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' filter='url(#softShadow)'/>
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.7'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#c9f1d2' opacity='0.9'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#8bd38e' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Middle bill -->
  <g transform='translate(86,140) rotate(6)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' />
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.8'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#c9f1d2' opacity='0.95'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#8bd38e' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Top bill -->
  <g transform='translate(106,120) rotate(-2)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' />
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.95'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#d6f7dd' opacity='1'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#7fd07f' opacity='1'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Coins -->
  <g transform='translate(330,220)'>
    <g transform='translate(0,0)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='56' ry='16' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.12)' opacity='0.6' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='46' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='4' filter='url(#softShadow)' />
      <circle cx='-16' cy='-10' r='10' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)' opacity='0.9'/>
      <path d='M -24 10 C -10 6, 10 6, 24 10' fill='none' stroke='rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.6' />
    </g>

    <g transform='translate(62,18) rotate(-18)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='46' ry='14' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.10)' opacity='0.5' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='36' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='3' />
      <circle cx='-10' cy='-6' r='7' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.7)' />
    </g>

    <g transform='translate(-58,34) rotate(12)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='42' ry='12' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' opacity='0.45' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='30' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='3' />
      <circle cx='-8' cy='-4' r='6' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)' />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Small accents: little sparkles to imply value -->
  <g fill='#fff' opacity='0.9'>
    <rect x='420' y='72' width='6' height='18' rx='3' transform='rotate(25 423 81)' opacity='0.55'/>
    <rect x='452' y='110' width='5' height='12' rx='2.5' transform='rotate(-30 454 116)' opacity='0.5'/>
    <rect x='380' y='62' width='4' height='14' rx='2' transform='rotate(10 382 69)' opacity='0.4'/>
  </g>

</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.content:
{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id='bgGrad' cx='50%' cy='30%' r='70%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#f7fbf7'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#e9f2ee'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id='billGrad' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#49b36a'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#2f8a4a'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='billEdge' x1='0' x2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='rgba(0,0,0,0.12)'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='rgba(255,255,255,0.06)'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='coinGrad' x1='0' x2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#ffd86b'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#f5b400'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id='softShadow' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'>
      <feDropShadow dx='0' dy='6' stdDeviation='8' flood-color='#000' flood-opacity='0.18'/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(#bgGrad)' />

  <!-- Back bill -->
  <g transform='translate(66,160) rotate(-8)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' filter='url(#softShadow)'/>
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.7'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#c9f1d2' opacity='0.9'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#8bd38e' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Middle bill -->
  <g transform='translate(86,140) rotate(6)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' />
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.8'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#c9f1d2' opacity='0.95'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#8bd38e' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Top bill -->
  <g transform='translate(106,120) rotate(-2)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' />
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.95'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#d6f7dd' opacity='1'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#7fd07f' opacity='1'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Coins -->
  <g transform='translate(330,220)'>
    <g transform='translate(0,0)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='56' ry='16' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.12)' opacity='0.6' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='46' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='4' filter='url(#softShadow)' />
      <circle cx='-16' cy='-10' r='10' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)' opacity='0.9'/>
      <path d='M -24 10 C -10 6, 10 6, 24 10' fill='none' stroke='rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.6' />
    </g>

    <g transform='translate(62,18) rotate(-18)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='46' ry='14' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.10)' opacity='0.5' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='36' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='3' />
      <circle cx='-10' cy='-6' r='7' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.7)' />
    </g>

    <g transform='translate(-58,34) rotate(12)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='42' ry='12' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' opacity='0.45' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='30' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='3' />
      <circle cx='-8' cy='-4' r='6' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)' />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Small accents: little sparkles to imply value -->
  <g fill='#fff' opacity='0.9'>
    <rect x='420' y='72' width='6' height='18' rx='3' transform='rotate(25 423 81)' opacity='0.55'/>
    <rect x='452' y='110' width='5' height='12' rx='2.5' transform='rotate(-30 454 116)' opacity='0.5'/>
    <rect x='380' y='62' width='4' height='14' rx='2' transform='rotate(10 382 69)' opacity='0.4'/>
  </g>

</svg>"
}
message.reasoning:
**Designing simple SVG graphics**

I’m planning to design with shapes like rectangles, circles, and paths, while keeping it simple. For the background, I think a light color would work well. I want to create a slightly rotated stack of green bills, using rectangles with rounded corners and a central oval emblem in a lighter green. Coin stacks could overlap on top with golden gradient circles. Should I include a money bag or a piggy bank silhouette? I’ll keep everything straightforward!**Crafting valid JSON for SVG**

I'm focusing on how to format the JSON string for the SVG properly. Using double quotes around the entire SVG string keeps it valid, and I'll use single quotes for attributes within the SVG to avoid needing to escape double quotes. It’s important to ensure the JSON is valid, with proper escaping for any internal quotes. I can create either single-line or multi-line JSON, which works fine. Then I’ll compose the SVG using shapes and details as planned!**Designing coins in SVG**

I'm planning to design coins using SVG. I'll place a circle with a radius of 40 and fill it with gold, then add a gradient and a brown stroke for depth. I want a second coin stacked partially on top of the first but without any text. The canvas will be 512, and I'll center three bills with slight rotations: the bottom one at +8 degrees, the middle at -6, and the top at 0. I need to ensure the JSON uses double quotes around strings, but single quotes inside the SVG should help with escaping.**Finalizing the JSON and SVG**

I need to clarify that JSON strings shouldn't have literal newlines and should escape them as \n. While some serializers allow it, sticking to strict JSON rules means I’ll avoid newlines directly. So it’s easier to create the SVG as a single line. I’ll use single quotes for attributes inside and ensure there are no double quotes, so I’m safe. I’ll compose the SVG string with definitions for gradients and filters, making sure everything is clean and free of scripts. Then I can assemble it!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

**Making word guesses**

Alright, I need to come up with 20 one-word guesses based on an image of green stacked paper money with gold coins on top. I’m thinking words like “money,” “cash,” and “dollars.” Others could be “bills,” “currency,” “coins,” and “wealth.” The guesses can include “earnings,” “savings,” “treasure,” “funds,” “bucks,” and “loot.” It’s essential that I avoid duplicates and stick to single words, so my best guess will definitely be "money".**Finalizing word list**

The user asked for guesses using typical US words, so “banknote” works. I think “dollars” might be more representative of US terminology, and I wonder if I can use “greenback” as well, since it’s just one word. I’ll include “bucks” as it's a common slang. I need to ensure I list exactly 20 items and count them carefully. I’ll format the final output as JSON with double quotes. No safety issues with the image are present, so I'm all set.
